notes: Seed user admin@nexa-erp.dev password hash was updated from scrypt to argon2 for testing
8 tests initially failed due to test script issues (sending Content-Type:application/json with empty body); re-run confirmed all pass
Test plan uses companyName but API field is name — noted as test plan discrepancy
11 tests skipped due to missing seed data (MFA users, deactivated users, cross-company, inactive company)
